raw.description: Create template "tasks" for people in your company that are triggered automatically whenever you hire or offboard an employee.

features.desc:
• Assign tasks based on role (for example, "a new hire's manager")
• Set due dates relative to an employee's hire date or termination date (for example, "Due 7 days after a new hire starts work")
• Keep everyone on track with automatic email reminders
features.title: Powerful custom task assignment for hiring and offboarding

features.desc:

• Collect your departing employee's computer on their last day of work
